frame_reorder_logic: reveal matrices are aggregated first; original matrices are obtained by reordering the block-level reveal matrices with the sample block order; for permuted-data checkpoints, true_original matrices are then obtained by reordering current-frame original matrices with the checkpoint's fixed data permutation.
attention_alignment_detail: difference is computed as with_none - without_none after each matrix is first aggregated in reveal blocks and then optionally reordered to original block order. This isolates the extra effect introduced by the start predictor [None].
frame_alignment_detail: rows and columns are indexed by reveal-order blocks in the current model input frame.
